sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111070" key="filoborra=s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-βορρᾶς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾶ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n111070.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving the North wind,</tr_> ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0099.tlg001.perseus-grc1:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">57</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
